scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev -w @trao/frontend" "npm run dev -w @trao/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trao/frontend && npm run build -w @trao/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @trao/frontend && npm run lint -w @trao/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @trao/frontend && npm run typecheck -w @trao/backend
